response.justification: Mohammed has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — critical for this role. His DLang and Node.js work shows systems thinking, but the required low-level systems and geospatial routing expertise are not clearly demonstrated in commercial contexts.
strengths: Demonstrated geospatial project experience via open-source GISCollective platform
Strong systems-level programming background with DLang and low-latency systems
Proven ability to work across full stack and learn new technologies rapidly
concerns: No explicit commercial experience with C++ or Rust in routing or navigation systems
Lack of demonstrated expertise in distributed systems concepts like fault tolerance or consistency at scale
Geospatial work is open-source and not tied to production routing tile pipelines or real-time traffic integration
